32.kj: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.

32.gl: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
32.kj: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.
[idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.

32.gl: properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol
32.dv: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of H8581 (תַּעָב);

32.gl: food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
32.kj: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.
32.dv: from H3898 (לָחַם); See also H1036 (בֵּית לְעַפְרָה)

33.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)

33.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

33.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
33.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
33.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

33.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry

33.gl: little; (in number) few; (in age) young, (in value) ignoble

33.kj: brother, companion, fellow, friend, husband, lover, neighbour, [idiom] (an-) other.

33.gl: the firstling of man or beast; abstractly primogeniture
